allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in data['features']: props = f['properties'] if props.get\('ISO_A3'\) == 'CMR' or props.get\('NAME'\) == 'Cameroon' or props.get\('ADM0_A3'\) == 'CMR': print\(json.dumps\(f['geometry']\)\) break ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in data['features']: props = f['properties'] if props.get\('ADM0_A3'\) == 'CMR' or props.get\('NAME'\) == 'Cameroon': geom = f['geometry'] if geom['type'] == 'Polygon': coords = geom['coordinates'][0] elif geom['type'] == 'MultiPolygon': largest = max\(geom['coordinates'], key=lambda p: len\(p[0]\)\) coords = largest[0] print\(f'Points: {len\(coords\)}'\) print\(json.dumps\(coords\)\) break ")
